overall.description: First-person perspective moving through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from a neon-lit covered corridor with vending machines to an elevated walkway overlooking a busy multi-level highway with prominent Japanese corporate signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway with blue neon walls and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor with blue neon lighting

entered.detail: smooth curved wall with blue metallic finish and purple neon accents
illuminated glass-front vending machines with digital interfaces
long rectangular ceiling light fixture emitting bright white light
large suspended digital screen displaying advertisements
transparent safety barrier along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through a covered elevated walkway with smooth blue curved walls and purple neon lighting. Vending machines line the left side while a large digital billboard hangs on the right. The environment is clean and futuristic with no other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved transition section opening to highway overlook

events.description: exiting the enclosed blue corridor as the curved wall falls away, revealing the open highway below

agents.ego_description: following the curved walkway as it opens up to reveal the highway view

entered.detail: multi-story industrial structure with green and red paneling and exposed pipes
stacked highway lanes with moving vehicle lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The walkway curves to the right, transitioning from the enclosed blue corridor to an open overlook. The blue wall recedes behind as a large green industrial building comes into view on the right. The multi-level highway becomes visible ahead with streams of vehicle lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook of busy multi-level highway

events.description: reaching the open overlook with full view of the highway traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge overlooking the traffic below on the multi-level highway

entered.detail: green building with prominent KIR@SHI signage and Japanese characters
active vehicle traffic moving along the illuminated highway below

segments.scene_description: Now fully open to the city air, the walkway runs alongside the highway with the green Kiroshi building prominent on the left. Traffic flows steadily on the multi-level road below, while the industrial structure looms closer on the right. The scene is bathed in mixed neon light from surrounding advertisements and building illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, enclosed neon corridor into a sprawling, open-air cyberpunk cityscape. It begins by gliding through a covered elevated walkway defined by smooth blue curved walls, purple neon lighting, and a row of vending machines. As the path curves to the right, the enclosed walls recede to reveal a vast urban overlook where a large green industrial building first appears. The scene then expands fully into the city air, shifting from the quiet corridor to a bustling vantage point alongside a multi-level highway filled with streaming vehicle lights. Finally, the camera moves parallel to the road, bathed in the mixed glow of corporate advertisements and the looming presence of the Kiroshi building.
